identity: Human male stormcaller, regal face with piercing ice-blue eyes, short white-blue hair swept back, fair skin with faint lightning-bolt tattoo on one cheek, tall upright build.
outfit: Deep-blue-and-silver storm-cloud-patterned robes with crackling lightning embroidery, silver shoulder-plates, a flowing storm-grey cape. A silver circlet on the brow with a single sapphire.
weapons: No held weapon. Both hands crackling with blue-white lightning arcs as his "weapon".
attackStyle: East-facing. Right hand thrust forward, a bolt of jagged blue-white lightning erupting outward, hair lifted by static.
spellStyle: East-facing. Both hands raised, a swirling storm-cloud forming above his head with lightning cracking from it.
blockStyle: East-facing. Arms crossed in front of chest, a translucent disc of crackling lightning forming between them and the attacker.
koStyle: East-facing, slumped on one knee, lightning on hands faded, cape pooled, circlet askew.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), regal idle. Both palms held low at sides with arcs of blue-white lightning dancing between fingertips.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Swept-back white-blue hair, silver circlet with sapphire, lightning-embroidered storm-blue robes.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human male stormcaller, regal face with piercing ice-blue eyes, short white-blue hair swept back, fair skin with faint lightning-bolt tattoo on one cheek, tall upright build.

OUTFIT: Deep-blue-and-silver storm-cloud-patterned robes with crackling lightning embroidery, silver shoulder-plates, a flowing storm-grey cape. A silver circlet on the brow with a single sapphire.

WEAPONS: No held weapon. Both hands crackling with blue-white lightning arcs as his "weapon".

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human male stormcaller, regal face with piercing ice-blue eyes, short white-blue hair swept back, fair skin with faint lightning-bolt tattoo on one cheek, tall upright build.

OUTFIT: Deep-blue-and-silver storm-cloud-patterned robes with crackling lightning embroidery, silver shoulder-plates, a flowing storm-grey cape. A silver circlet on the brow with a single sapphire.

WEAPONS: No held weapon. Both hands crackling with blue-white lightning arcs as his "weapon".

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Swept-back white-blue hair, silver circlet with sapphire, lightning-embroidered storm-blue robes.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
